investmentsImport.title: Import transactions
investmentsImport.description: Upload an exchange CSV, a broker PDF, or paste your transaction history. AI will extract buys and sells. You'll review before anything is imported.

review.empty: AI didn't find any transactions in this file.
review.duplicateSecurity: Same security is picked on another row
review.duplicateBadgeTooltip: This looks like a possible duplicate of an existing transaction. Click to skip it — otherwise a new transaction will be created alongside the existing one (no merge or override).

tooltips.security: We picked a security automatically based on the AI-extracted ticker. Click the field to override the match if it's wrong.
tooltips.currency: Currency the cash side of the trade was settled in (e.g. USD, EUR). It does not change how the holding is stored — amounts are normalized to your base currency using historical exchange rates at the trade date.
tooltips.parentRowDuplicates: {count} {count, plural, one {possible duplicate} other {possible duplicates}} in this holding will be imported as new transactions unless skipped.

notifications.extractFailed: Could not extract transactions from the file.
